title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・Win!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Gooo!
Run, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Rrraaagh! I'm coming for you, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(No, stay away. I won't let you have it... I won't let
you take my victory...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I absolutely will not lose! HAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell? What's with that face?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That yell? That passion? I thought she kept those
hidden away...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are things changing? Can she actually
change things? There's no way...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Could she be the one to tear everything down?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Pft... What am I, stupid? She'll be gone soon.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Everything will go according to my
data. However, if there's even a millimeter of
wiggle room...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa!
That was intense!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible run by Fine Motion!
Kawakami was amazing too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I looost! Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Did I... beat you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Why else would I be crying?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time I've seen you so pumped up,
Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You were completely into it, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I get it. I'm super bummed about losing, but it was
a lot of fun too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. Thank you, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Just now, I...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I forgot for a moment that I was "Fine Motion"
the lady.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion was able to defeat her challenger,
Kawakami Princess. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I think I finally understand what makes racing fun.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I reckon it's because everyone competes with a
genuine desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami cried after she lost. That proves how
much our race must have meant to her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And when I realized that I wanted to win, it
became twice as fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These are likely her true feelings, but I get the
sense it isn't what she wants to talk about right
now. I'm about to ask her, when...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's decide on a race for next year, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep running, and... I want to choose
another smashing race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her ability, she should be more than capable
of running more high-level G1 races. That doesn't
mean it will be easy, however.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure you're okay to keep racing like we
have been?

Are you sure you're okay to keep racing like we
have been?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm asking to make sure she still has the resolve to
be a racer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course! Please, go on.
choice_data_list: What do you think about the Osaka Hai?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai is a G1 race that decides the best
medium-distance runner of the spring. I'd like to
put both Fine Motion's skills to the test with this
rather intense bout.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll find many challenging rivals.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. I certainly hope so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our next objective is the Osaka Hai—the
first battle for the Senior Spring Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We return to the waiting room to find an
unexpected visitor waiting for us.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So you did come to watch me race? I knew you
woul—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Should you really be so laid-back right now? You
only have one year left, you know.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You understand what that means, right? All the
joys you've managed to find will all vanish.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not a single one will remain—all you'll have is
those memories you love so much.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Spare me the lecture, thanks. I'm only stating
facts.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I told you before, didn't I? This is where she
peaks. My data shows that things will peter out
quietly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you don't like it, all you can do is fight.
You get that, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know Air Shakur very well, but she's not
the kind to hurt someone for the fun of it. She
must have some kind of objective...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Shakur sure likes playing the villain.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She's always like that, so please don't let it
bother you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Besides, we've got the Osaka Hai as our next
objective! Now, let's go get some Kyoto ramen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is acting the same as ever. Her smile
is perfectly bright... but she seems vaguely
uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I absolutely will not lose! HAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'd have been better off never finding those joys
to begin with. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: They're all just going to disappear anyway.
